cd "C:\Users\Admin\OneDrive\Documents\max" && python -c "
import os, asyncio, httpx
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
TG_TOKEN = os.environ['TG_TOKEN']

async def send_doc():
    # Get chat_id first
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30) as c:
        r = await c.get(f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{TG_TOKEN}/getUpdates')
        data = r.json()
        chat_id = None
        for u in data.get('result', []):
            msg = u.get('message') or u.get('channel_post')
            if msg:
                chat_id = msg['chat']['id']
        if not chat_id:
            chat_id = 7276104201
        print(f'Sending to chat_id: {chat_id}')
        with open('C:/tmp/Lebanon_Tourism_2026.pptx', 'rb') as f:
            r2 = await c.post(
                f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{TG_TOKEN}/sendDocument',
                data={'chat_id': chat_id, 'caption': 'Lebanon Tourism PowerPoint - here is the full PPTX file'},
                files={'document': ('Lebanon_Tourism_2026.pptx', f, 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation')}
            )
        print(r2.status_code, r2.text[:300])

asyncio.run(send_doc())
"

    'leb_jounieh': 'https://max.vdo-x.art/img/img_1781302151643.jpg',
}
os.makedirs('C:/tmp', exist_ok=True)
for name, url in imgs.items():
    path = f'C:/tmp/{name}.jpg'
    r = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
    print(f'{name}: status={r.status_code} size={len(r.content)}')
